package rulecoverage

func PositiveDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "dumprequest_or_dumpresponse_in_hot_path"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Request-path handlers that dump full HTTP requests or responses with httputil."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
